'''鈭歠-d-s''' ('''kafadas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hist|hist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hist|hist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-d-s
|-
! Lemma
| kafadas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifadas|thifadas]] || [[word:jifadas|jifadas]] || [[word:shifadas|shifadas]] || [[word:kifadas|kifadas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufadas|thuthufadas]] || [[word:jujufadas|jujufadas]] || [[word:shushufadas|shushufadas]] || [[word:kukufadas|kukufadas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufadas|thufadas]] || [[word:jufadas|jufadas]] || [[word:shufadas|shufadas]] || [[word:kufadas|kufadas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufadas|thufadas]] || [[word:jufadas|jufadas]] || [[word:shufadas|shufadas]] || [[word:kufadas|kufadas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefadas|thefadas]] || [[word:jefadas|jefadas]] || [[word:shefadas|shefadas]] || [[word:kefadas|kefadas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofadas|thothofadas]] || [[word:jojofadas|jojofadas]] || [[word:shoshofadas|shoshofadas]] || [[word:kokofadas|kokofadas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofadas|thofadas]] || [[word:jofadas|jofadas]] || [[word:shofadas|shofadas]] || [[word:kofadas|kofadas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofadas|thofadas]] || [[word:jofadas|jofadas]] || [[word:shofadas|shofadas]] || [[word:kofadas|kofadas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]] || [[word:fadas|fadas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fadas|th忙fadas]] || [[word:j忙fadas|j忙fadas]] || [[word:sh忙fadas|sh忙fadas]] || [[word:k忙fadas|k忙fadas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafadas|thathafadas]] || [[word:jajafadas|jajafadas]] || [[word:shashafadas|shashafadas]] || [[word:kakafadas|kakafadas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafadas|thafadas]] || [[word:jafadas|jafadas]] || [[word:shafadas|shafadas]] || [[word:kafadas|kafadas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafadas|thafadas]] || [[word:jafadas|jafadas]] || [[word:shafadas|shafadas]] || [[word:kafadas|kafadas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafadas|shafadas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafadas|goshafadas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafadas|gokishafadas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafadasn眉|shafadasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafadasnkn眉|goshafadasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadasn眉|gokishafadasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafadassh毛|shafadassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafadasnksh毛|goshafadasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafadassh毛|gokishafadassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadasro|shafadasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadasnkro|goshafadasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadasro|gokishafadasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadasmu|shafadasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadasnkmu|goshafadasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadasmu|gokishafadasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafadassher|shafadassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafadasnksher|goshafadasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafadassher|gokishafadassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafadasng|shafadasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafadasnkng|goshafadasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafadasng|gokishafadasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafadasya|shafadasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafadasnkya|goshafadasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafadasya|gokishafadasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafadasyam|shafadasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafadasnkyam|goshafadasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafadasyam|gokishafadasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadasn眉sh毛|shafadasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadasnkn眉sh毛|goshafadasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadasn眉sh毛|gokishafadasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadasn眉ro|shafadasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadasnkn眉ro|goshafadasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadasn眉ro|gokishafadasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadasn眉mu|shafadasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadasnkn眉mu|goshafadasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadasn眉mu|gokishafadasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadassh毛n眉|shafadassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadasnksh毛n眉|goshafadasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadassh毛n眉|gokishafadassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadassh毛ro|shafadassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadasnksh毛ro|goshafadasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadassh毛ro|gokishafadassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadassh毛mu|shafadassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadasnksh毛mu|goshafadasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadassh毛mu|gokishafadassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadasron眉|shafadasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadasnkron眉|goshafadasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadasron眉|gokishafadasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadasrosh毛|shafadasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadasnkrosh毛|goshafadasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadasrosh毛|gokishafadasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadasromu|shafadasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadasnkromu|goshafadasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadasromu|gokishafadasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadasmun眉|shafadasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadasnkmun眉|goshafadasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadasmun眉|gokishafadasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadasmush毛|shafadasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadasnkmush毛|goshafadasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadasmush毛|gokishafadasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadasmuro|shafadasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadasnkmuro|goshafadasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadasmuro|gokishafadasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
